title: collate: COST_REPORT.md written to SNN/ stub dirs instead of existing sprint_NN_*/ dirs
description: collate.cjs lines 246-251 resolves the sprint directory for COST_REPORT using resolveDir(sprintId, sprintId.split('-').pop()) — both candidates are identical for IDs without hyphens (e.g. 'S30'), neither exists, so resolveDir falls back to create a stub dir. sprint.path is already in the JSON and ignored. Linked to GitHub issue #21.
